default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Getting to know Marcel Santilli and exploring potential advisory or collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel has extensive experience in content marketing, community building, and go-to-market strategies from roles at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, and Anthropic.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [He is passionate about helping founders navigate the changing landscape of AI and automation.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [There may be an opportunity for Marcel to advise an AI infrastructure startup like MindsDB that Mayfield has invested in.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background

  - [Originally from Brazil, moved to Texas at age 11](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Early career at IBM and HP building content hubs and online communities](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - Employee \#100 at HashiCorp, built growth marketing and go-to-market strategy
  - [Joined Anthropic at $100M ARR with 2 person marketing team, launched major virtual conferences](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
